## Module Name

Provide a clear name for the proposed module.

## Category

Choose one:

- Software Engineering
- Security
- Cloud and DevOps
- Career
- University
- Other

## Purpose

What should this module help developers do?

## Expected Responsibilities

List the main checks, tasks, or outputs.

## Example Use Case

Provide one realistic example.

## Additional Context

Add any useful references or implementation ideas.
